name: SAST Finding Triage
description: Automated triage workflow for Static Application Security Testing (SAST) findings. Riggs AI analyzes the code vulnerability context, determines severity and exploitability, then routes critical/high findings to the development team via Jira with remediation guidance, while low-risk findings are logged for tracking.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for confirmed SAST findings and assign to development teams

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the security engineering channel about critical code vulnerabilities

data.title: SAST Finding Received
data.summary: Triggers when a SAST tool reports a code vulnerability finding

config.description: Ingests findings from SAST scanners such as SonarQube, Checkmarx, Semgrep, or CodeQL

data.title: AI Vulnerability Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI assesses the SAST finding for exploitability and real-world risk

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate the SAST finding in context: check CWE category, data flow reachability, whether user input reaches the sink, and if the vulnerable code path is in production. Distinguish true positives from false positives.
config.description: AI-powered code vulnerability assessment using the vuln_risk analysis template

data.title: Critical or High Severity?
data.summary: Route based on AI-assessed severity of the SAST finding

data.title: Create Remediation Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira ticket assigned to the owning dev team with fix guidance

config.description: Create a prioritized Jira ticket for the development team with vulnerability details and remediation guidance

data.title: Notify Security Engineering
data.summary: Alert the security engineering team on Slack about the critical finding

data.title: Set SLA: 48 Hours
data.summary: Set remediation SLA for critical/high SAST findings

config.description: Set a 48-hour SLA timer for critical/high code vulnerability remediation

data.title: Log Finding for Tracking
data.summary: Log the low/medium finding for backlog tracking without immediate action

config.note: SAST finding assessed as {{analyze-1.result.severity}} severity. Logged for backlog tracking. CWE: {{trigger-1.alert.cwe_id}}, File: {{trigger-1.alert.file_path}}

data.title: End — Ticket Created
data.summary: Critical/high SAST finding triaged, ticket created, team notified

config.summary: SAST finding confirmed as critical/high risk. Jira ticket created and security engineering notified.

data.title: End — Logged for Backlog
data.summary: Low/medium finding logged for future remediation

config.summary: SAST finding assessed as low/medium risk. Logged for backlog tracking.
